items.name: 三十三観音碑
items.description: 文政7年（1824年）に勧請され、一番碑から三十三番碑までが建てられている観音像の石碑。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Onagawa Town.

items.name: 補陀閣関係石碑・木額・鰐口
items.location: 女川町文化財保存展示施設
items.description: 補陀閣内部にあった3基の石碑・木額・鰐口と外側の5基の石碑。

en.name_en: Stone Monument, Wooden Tablet, and Gong Associated with Fudaraku Pavilion
en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Onagawa Town. It is located at the Onagawa Town Cultural Property Preservation and Exhibition Facility.

items.name: 波切不動尊
items.description: 文政7年（1824年）建立の不動尊。

en.description_en: A tangible cultural property. It is town-designated by Onagawa Town. It is located at the entrance to the Thirty-Three Kannon path.
